source_note: DC PSC Formal Case No. 1115 — Final Report, Management Audit of Washington Gas Light Company's PROJECTpipes accelerated pipe-replacement program, prepared for the Commission by The Liberty Consulting Group (April 19, 2019, 140 pp; public version, confidential material redacted).
